title: Everbuild All Purpose Ready Mixed Filler, White, 600 g & Everbuild Caulk Once Premium Quality Acrylic Caulk, White, 295 ml
features: Product 1: Ready mixed formulation that you can apply straight from the tub
Product 1: Extra tough heavy duty composition enabling both interior and exterior use
Product 1: Dries to a smooth crack resistant finish that can be overpainted, overstained or papered over
Product 1: Fills gaps, cracks and holes up to 9 mm deep in one coat and further layers can be built up if required
Product 2: High Performing Caulk: Using an advanced high quality polymer, Caulk Once offers superior adhesion and low shrink properties that outperforms other decorating caulks and fillers.
Product 2: Two in One Filler and Sealant: Superior permanently flexible and slump resistant properties have been specifically designed to provide excellent gap filling and sealant functions.
Product 2: Filler: Can be used to fill damaged plaster.
Product 2: Quick Curing Time: Rapid tack time of 15 minutes which can be overpainted after 1 hour.
description: From the manufacturer Everbuild All Purpose Filler, Fast Drying Filler for Instant Repairs to Minor Imperfections, White, 600 g All Purpose Filler is an easy to use ready mixed filler which is suitable for both interior and exterior use. Dries to a smooth but tough crack resistant sandable finish which may be painted, papered or stained. The product is designed for indoor or outdoor repairs to plaster, plasterboard, brick, render, wood, stone and most other building materials. EVERBUILD ALL PURPOSE READY MIXED FILLER is an easy to use ready mixed filler which is suitable for both interior and exterior use. Dries to a smooth but tough crack resistant sandable finish which may be painted, papered or stained. The product is designed for indoor or outdoor repairs to plaster, plasterboard, brick, render, wood, stone and most other building materials. Characteristics/Advantages Heavy-duty tough filler – interior or exterior use. Ready mixed formula – apply straight from tub. Overpaintable with most solvent based and emulsion paints. Overstainable Dries white. Caulk Once Discover the Benefits High performing caulk Superior high grab adhesion Two in one filler and sealant Suitable for filling damaged plaster Excellent non-sag and low shrink properties Quick curing time Permanently flexible
